query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commission_payouts) as total_payouts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE isActive = 1) as total_active_deals, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dealId) FROM commission_payouts) as deals_with_payouts;
